content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于5月8日19:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月22日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、故事
● 调查行动
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」5-14 剧情中某些音乐片段重复播放的问题。
● 秘典书库
    ○ 修复了广播剧「背弃的慈恩」在通关「星辰篇」5-1 后错误地提前解锁的问题，应该为通关「星辰篇」5-16 后解锁。此前已经解锁的守密人不受影响。
● 本地化
    ○ 简体中文
        ■ 修复了「星辰篇」第五章「织命剧场」中部分剧情文本错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了「星辰篇」第五章「织命剧场」5-12 中剧情序号错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了意识潜游「不朽极昼」中部分剧情文本错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「徐」、「奥尔拉」、「莫丝」的档案中身高数据格式错误的问题。
    ○ 英语
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「莉莉」的部分台词中对「弗朗西斯」的称呼不统一的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「徐」激活启灵「极乐之吻」后，狂气爆发描述未随启灵激活更新的问题。
        ■ 修复了钥令「深宅往事」的获取途径文本显示错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了密契「少女之蛹」、「光合作用」的名称在部分界面措辞不统一的问题。
        ■ 修复了「星辰篇」第五章「织命剧场」中部分文本错误地重复显示的问题。
        ■ 修复了「星辰篇」第五章「织命剧场」中部分探索事件选项异常的问题。
        ■ 修复了特遣纪录「血的颜色」中部分文本标点、拼写格式错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了意识潜游「不朽极昼」中文本显示错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了「幻梦深潜」中的规则说明文本翻译过时的问题。
 
二、战斗
● 唤醒体
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「达芙黛尔」的卡牌「千面幻象」在某些情况下会错误地获得 2 次可叠加的「奇点信标」的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「达芙黛尔」的卡牌「千面幻象」在施加「繁育」刻印后复制的卡牌选择词条丢失的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「艾瑞卡」激活「最终法则」后，灵知觉醒「参数拟合」提供的临时力量错误翻倍的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「克莱门汀」的技能「精神抚慰」无法移除敌人「甜蜜恶鬼」、「阿吉达哈卡」、「勒耳纳恩」的「疯狂」状态的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「徐」的「打击」和「防御」因启灵3「极乐之吻」触发共振翻倍效果时，获得的狂气值与描述显示可能因取整存在少量误差的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「尤乌哈希」在释放觉醒「红祭礼」后，仍然会收到「卡牌封印」的问题。
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了与背弃之网「涅芙蕾亚」的战斗中，「银钥曦光」、「银钥微光」等卡牌无法降低「命网扰动」层数的问题。
    ○ 修复了与背弃之网「涅芙蕾亚」的战斗中，敌人的维度裂隙描述错误的问题。
    ○ 修复了发动「超维空间」后，造物「维度影象·旺达」无法正确触发的问题。
    ○ 修复了卡牌「乌托邦帷幕」无法驱散「卡牌封印」的问题。
    ○ 修复了在敌人信息中，唤醒体「阿拉克涅」缺乏「异变体」克制标识的问题。

三、任务与奖励
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了「相位对弈：预组模式」5 月 4 日赛季结算中部分守密人未收到排行奖励的问题，更新后重新登录可在邮件中领取补发奖励。
● 邮件
    ○ 修复了「V2.5.0 版本体验调研问卷」邮件中，点击问卷链接无法前往填写的问题。此前已收到过调研问卷的守密人，更新后至 5 月 16 日 9:00 之前，首次日内累计在线时间超过 10 分钟后，将收到新的调研问卷邮件。

四、界面与功能
● 密境课室
    ○ 修复了「强化秘仪」中，未解锁的「超验存在」关卡仍可跳转前往的问题。
    ○ 修复了「日常试训」或「周常试训」中奖励全部领取之后，仍然错误地显示红点提示的问题。
● 物资
    ○ 修复了使用「时间原点」回溯命轮后，「黑池归还」的返还预览中，某些情况下多个「轮转之书」未能合并显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了使用「时间原点」回溯命轮后，该命轮的可回溯红点提示未在「命轮」页签显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了部分语言设置下「空幻之芯」的描述文本重叠的问题。

五、综合
● 兼容性
    ○ 修复了使用 PC 游玩时，在窗口拉伸后再还原，某些情况下画面可能无法正常显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了部分网络异常情况下，战斗胜利后网络重新连接时，画面可能会出现卡顿的问题。

**V2.5.0.6 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on May 8 at 19:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 22, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Bug Fix]
1. Story
● Investigation
    ○ Fixed an issue where certain music segments would play repeatedly in the "Astral Reign" 5-14 Story.
● Library
    ○ Fixed an issue where the audio drama "Betrayed Benevolence" was incorrectly unlocked early after Clearing "Astral Reign" 5-1. It should be unlocked after Clearing "Astral Reign" 5-16. Keepers who have already unlocked it will not be affected.
● Localization
    ○ Simplified Chinese
        ■ Fixed an issue where some Story text errors occurred in Chapter 5 "Astral Reign" of "Fated Theater."
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Story sequence number was incorrect in Astral Reign Chapter 5 "Fated Theater" 5-12.
        ■ Fixed an issue where certain Story text errors occurred in the Psyche Deepdive "Everburning Vex".
        ■ Fixed an issue where the height data format in the profiles of Awakeners "Xu", "Horla", and "Vortice" was incorrect.
    ○ English
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Lily" referred to "Francis" inconsistently in some of her lines.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Xu" activating Enlighten "Nirvana's Kiss" did not update the Exalt description upon Enlighten activation.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the acquisition method text for the Posse "Manor Echoes" was displaying incorrectly.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the names of the Covenants "Cocoon of the Maiden" and "Photosynthesis" were displayed inconsistently across certain interfaces.
        ■ Fixed an issue where certain text in "Astral Reign" Chapter 5 "Fated Theater" was incorrectly displayed repeatedly.
        ■ Fixed an issue where certain exploration event options were abnormal in Chapter 5 of "Astral Reign" in Fated Theater.
        ■ Fixed an issue with punctuation, spelling, and formatting errors in certain texts in the Special Ops "The Color of Blood."
        ■ Fixed an issue where text displayed incorrectly in the Psyche Deepdive "Everburning Vex".
        ■ Fixed an issue where the rule description text in "Phantasmal Dive" had an outdated translation.

2. Combat
● Awakener
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Daffodil"'s Card "Thousand Mirage" would incorrectly gain 2 stackable "Singularity Beacon" in certain situations.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Card "Thousand Mirage" of Awakener "Daffodil" would lose its selected entries on copied Cards after applying the "Breeding" Orison.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Temporary STR provided by Gnosis Rouse "Parameter Fitting" was incorrectly doubled after Awakener "Erica" activated "Absolute Axiom".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Clementine"'s skill "Soulsalve" was unable to remove the "Madness" State from enemies "Sweet Demon", "Azhdaha", and "Lernaean".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Xu"'s "Strike" and "Defence" could have a slight discrepancy between the Aliemus gained and the description displayed due to rounding errors when triggering the Resonance doubling Effect from Enlighten 3 "Nirvana's Kiss".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Uvhash" would still receive "Card Seal" after unleashing the Rouse "Vermilion Rite".
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue in the battle against the Web of Betrayal "Nefraea" where Cards such as "Silver Key Dawn" and "Silver Key Gleam" were unable to reduce the stacks of "Web Disruption".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Dimensional Rift description for enemies was incorrect during the battle with the Web of Betrayal "Nefraea".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Relic "Dimension Shadow·Wanda" could not trigger correctly after activating "Ultra Space".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the card "Utopian Veil" could not dispel "Card Seal".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Arachne" was missing the "Mutant" Counter indicator in the enemy information.
 
3. Missions & Rewards
● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue where some Keepers did not receive ranking rewards during the "Traphase: All Pick" season settlement on May 4. After the update, log back in to claim the reissued rewards in your mailbox.
● Mail
    ○ Fixed an issue where clicking the survey link in the "V2.5.0 Version Experience Survey" email failed to redirect users to the survey. Keepers who had previously received the survey email will receive a new survey email after the update, provided they accumulate more than 10 minutes of online time within a single day for the first time before 9:00 on May 16.
 
4. Interface and Features
● Handbook
    ○ Fixed an issue where locked "Arcane Dominion" Stages in "Growth Guide" could still be navigated to.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the red dot notification would still incorrectly appear after all rewards had been claimed in "Daily Drills" or "Weekly Trials".
● Supplies
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after using "Origin of Time" to Reset the Wheel of Destiny, multiple "Book of Rotation" entries failed to merge in the Return preview of "Genesis Return" under certain circumstances.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after using "Origin of Time" to Reset the Wheel of Destiny, the red dot Hint indicating the Wheel of Destiny could be Reset was not displayed on the "Wheel of Destiny" tab.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the description text of "Ethereal Core" overlapped in certain language settings.
 
5. General
● Compatibility
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when playing on PC, after stretching and then restoring the window, the screen might not display correctly in certain situations.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the screen might stutter when the network reconnected after a Battle Won under certain abnormal network conditions.
說起星辰五劇情文本問題，有沒有同樣繁中的玩家可以告訴我是只有我還是全世界只要把語言調成繁中去看劇情都能看到一堆用法錯誤的頓號(、)，這個符號一直用錯真的給我看煩了，本來想說算了，但簡中朋友告訴我劇情文本是正常的沒有滿屏頓號(、)，到底用的是什麼鬼翻譯器能搞成這樣
Hm. How did I send that
